matches.x: 1 IT is necessary that ye should remain for the present time in your places of abode, as it shall be suitable to your circumstances.

•eemsth them good, for it most needs be necessity that they have places to live for the present time.
* It most needs be necessary, that ye save all the money that ye can, and that ye ob- tain all that ye can in righteousness, that In time ye may be enabled to purchase lands lor an inheritance, even the city. The place is not yet to be revealed, but after your brethren come from the east, there…
